question.label: Priority clarity
question.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
question.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

answer: I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.

assessment.note: She pivoted from current-week priorities to stalled mentoring and said she "stopped pushing," which signals unclear near-term focus and mild disengagement; also revealed a strong growth thread worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Stopped pushing
new_queue.name: You said "stopped pushing" — what made you back off?

new_queue.label: Next-quarter shape
new_queue.name: What do you expect to own next quarter?

new_queue.label: Launch leverage
new_queue.name: What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given all that, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
